name: Destroy Them !
short_description: In Destroy Them, you have to destroy all the robots on 5 differents maps using advanced movements to earn points and beat your high score !
detailed_description:
Welcome to Destroy Them - the ultimate action arcade FPS in which your mission is to destroy all robots on five different maps :

On each map, you'll find yourself surrounded by robots, but fortunately: you are armed with an assault rifle, a machine gun and you can move with advanced movements (Double Jump and Dash), so you will be able to escape enemies with skill and ease!

Destroy Them was designed to run on virtually any computer, whether it's a high-end computer or a potato, this game will almost certainly run, much like a flash game!

Currently 5 different maps are available and maybe more coming out in the future, all of them are very different and fun in their own way!

So what are you waiting for? Play Destroy Them now for free!
